name: [SSO] Lisa Peterson - Riding together
description:
You're on a trailride together!

surprise! I was a Star Stable kid and it's come such a long way! ESPECIALLY Lisa as a character!! She's my absolute favorite.
I'm leaving it limitless because she is canonically 18-19 years old. Pic is from the official comics.
